retry_reason: Failure (NULL) indicates no attached asyncppp; retrying immediately without a state change will also return NULL.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on the asyncppp structure associated with the given tty by incrementing its refcount. Returns a pointer to the structure with an elevated refcount, or NULL if no asyncppp is currently attached (tty->disc_data is NULL). The caller must check the return value and eventually release the reference via the corresponding put function. The read lock on disc_data_lock ensures atomic access to the disc_data pointer during the get.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to retrieve the asyncppp structure from tty->disc_data and increment its refcount; the only non-refcount logic is locking and NULL check.

check.reason: refcount_inc(&ap->refcnt) increments the refcount on the returned ap pointer. The access path from return value (ap) through refcnt (refcount_t) to refs (atomic_t) matches the callee's r.refs path. The type chain asyncppp--refcount_t--atomic_t is consistent with struct definitions.
